variant_name: 高令宁 — 重生归来（前期常服）
trigger: 重生后在娘家退婚、筹谋以及与沈词周旋拉扯的时期（前期主要形象）

appearance_delta.face: 妆容精致端庄，眼神极度冷静、充满防备与审视，毫无少女的娇憨
appearance_delta.body: 纤细匀称，姿态挺拔，带有当家主母的威严
appearance_delta.hair: 一丝不苟的端庄主母髻，配以华贵但不张扬的发饰
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 脖颈处隐约可见极淡的自刎幻痛红痕，眼神极具压迫感

costume_override.outfit: 华贵端庄的当家主母常服，剪裁考究、质地优良的汉服

visual_reference: A beautiful young ancient Chinese noble woman, elegant but with a stubborn and cold gaze, wearing exquisite traditional Hanfu in pale blue and celadon, hair tied in a dignified matriarch bun with elegant hairpins, a very faint pale red scar on her neck, standing in a traditional Chinese courtyard, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, 8k resolution, photorealistic.
emotional_tone: 冷漠清醒，充满掌控欲与防备
